page.title: Sunseeker Manhattan 66 vs Princess V58 Marbella

data.meta_description: Compare Sunseeker Manhattan 66 vs Princess V58 for Marbella charter. See specs, prices, and which suits your group. Book your ideal boat today.
data.summary: A detailed comparison of the Sunseeker Manhattan 66 and Princess V58 for charter in Marbella, covering size, capacity, features, and pricing to help you choose the best boat for your day on the Costa del Sol.
key_facts: Sunseeker Manhattan 66: 20.1m, 12 pax, flybridge, departs Puerto Banús
Princess V58: 18.3m, 10 pax, sport yacht, departs Puerto Banús
Both include licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% VAT
Manhattan 66 offers more deck space and a flybridge for lounging
Princess V58 is faster and more agile, ideal for shorter trips
Pricing on request via WhatsApp – contact us for a quote
Both boats are available for half-day and full-day charters

faq.q: Which is bigger, the Sunseeker Manhattan 66 or the Princess V58?
faq.a: The Sunseeker Manhattan 66 is 20.1 metres long, while the Princess V58 measures 18.3 metres. The Manhattan 66 also has more interior volume and a full flybridge, making it feel more spacious.

faq.q: How many passengers can each boat take?
faq.a: The Sunseeker Manhattan 66 can carry up to 12 passengers. The Princess V58 has a maximum capacity of 10 passengers. Both are ideal for groups of friends or family.
The Princess V58 is a sportier model with a top speed around 32 knots, while the Sunseeker Manhattan 66 cruises at about 28 knots. The V58 is better for those who want a thrilling ride.

faq.q: Do these boats have a flybridge?
faq.a: Yes, the Sunseeker Manhattan 66 features a spacious flybridge with seating and a sunpad. The Princess V58 does not have a flybridge; it focuses on a sleek, open-plan cockpit and sundeck.

faq.q: What is included in the charter price?
faq.a: Both charters include a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). The only extra is a potential deposit.

faq.q: Which boat is better for a family day out?
faq.a: The Sunseeker Manhattan 66 is more family-friendly thanks to its flybridge, large saloon, and multiple seating areas. The Princess V58 is better for a smaller, more active group.

faq.q: Can I charter these boats for a full day?
faq.a: Yes, both boats are available for half-day (4 hours) and full-day (8 hours) charters. Contact us via WhatsApp for exact availability and pricing.

faq.q: How do I book the Sunseeker Manhattan 66 or Princess V58?
faq.a: You can book by contacting us directly through WhatsApp. We'll confirm availability, provide a custom quote, and arrange your charter from Puerto Banús.

data.body_html:
When choosing a luxury motor yacht for a day on the Costa del Sol, two names often come up: the Sunseeker Manhattan 66 and the Princess V58. Both are exceptional boats that depart from Puerto Banús, but they cater to different tastes. This guide breaks down the key differences to help you decide which is right for your Marbella charter.

Size and Layout

The Sunseeker Manhattan 66 measures 20.1 metres in length, while the Princess V58 is 18.3 metres. The Manhattan 66 offers a full flybridge with additional seating and sunbathing areas, making it ideal for groups who want separate zones for lounging, dining, and sunbathing. The Princess V58 is a sportier model with a more streamlined deck layout, focusing on an open-plan cockpit and a large sundeck aft.

Passenger Capacity

The Sunseeker Manhattan 66 can carry up to 12 passengers, making it suitable for larger parties. The Princess V58 has a maximum capacity of 10 passengers. If you have a group of 11 or 12, the Manhattan 66 is the clear choice. For smaller groups, the V58 offers a more intimate experience.

Performance and Speed

The Princess V58 is the faster boat, with a top speed around 32 knots compared to the Manhattan 66's 28 knots. The V58's deep-V hull and lighter weight give it a sportier feel, ideal for those who enjoy a bit of speed. The Manhattan 66 cruises comfortably at 24–26 knots, prioritising stability and comfort over outright pace.

Interior and Comfort

The Manhattan 66 features a spacious saloon with full galley, dining area, and three cabins below. The flybridge adds a second helm station and generous seating. The Princess V58 has a more compact but beautifully finished interior, with two cabins and a well-equipped cockpit. Both boats offer air conditioning, a sound system, and ample storage for your gear.

Price and Booking

Both boats are priced on request. As a guide, similar-sized boats in our fleet (like the Boat Rental Marbella Azimut 58 Flybridge) start from around €2,299 for an 8-hour charter. Contact us via WhatsApp for a precise quote for the Manhattan 66 or V58. All charters include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% VAT.

Which One Should You Choose?

Choose the Sunseeker Manhattan 66 if you have a larger group, want a flybridge for panoramic views, and prefer a relaxed, spacious day out. Choose the Princess V58 if you want a sportier, more intimate experience with a focus on speed and sleek design. Both are excellent yachts for exploring the Marbella coastline, from Cabopino to Estepona.

Frequently asked questions

Which is bigger, the Sunseeker Manhattan 66 or the Princess V58?

The Sunseeker Manhattan 66 is 20.1 metres long, while the Princess V58 measures 18.3 metres. The Manhattan 66 also has more interior volume and a full flybridge, making it feel more spacious.

How many passengers can each boat take?

The Sunseeker Manhattan 66 can carry up to 12 passengers. The Princess V58 has a maximum capacity of 10 passengers. Both are ideal for groups of friends or family.

Which boat is faster?

The Princess V58 is a sportier model with a top speed around 32 knots, while the Sunseeker Manhattan 66 cruises at about 28 knots. The V58 is better for those who want a thrilling ride.

Do these boats have a flybridge?

Yes, the Sunseeker Manhattan 66 features a spacious flybridge with seating and a sunpad. The Princess V58 does not have a flybridge; it focuses on a sleek, open-plan cockpit and sundeck.

What is included in the charter price?

Both charters include a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). The only extra is a potential deposit.

Which boat is better for a family day out?

The Sunseeker Manhattan 66 is more family-friendly thanks to its flybridge, large saloon, and multiple seating areas. The Princess V58 is better for a smaller, more active group.

Can I charter these boats for a full day?

Yes, both boats are available for half-day (4 hours) and full-day (8 hours) charters. Contact us via WhatsApp for exact availability and pricing.

How do I book the Sunseeker Manhattan 66 or Princess V58?

You can book by contacting us directly through WhatsApp. We'll confirm availability, provide a custom quote, and arrange your charter from Puerto Banús.
